SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Vector<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of elements.
All Superinterfaces:
Collection<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Vector.VectorImpl
public interface Vector<T> extends Collection<T>
Persistent Vector implementation using a Bitmapped Vector Trie.

      default Vector<T> drop(int n)
      Description copied from interface: Collection
      Drops the first n elements from the collection.

      n - Number of elements to drop.
      Returns:
